subcodes.first_line: O thou who art advancing toward the Kingdom of Abha! This tradition does not mean literally, it has other meanings than the mere "letters"
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت ابهی از عدم مجال بجواب مختصر قناعت نما مقصود از عبارت حدیث
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @material world a reflection of the spiritual
